overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing two characters riding horses along a narrow mountain trail. The journey progresses from a rocky forested area past a wooden trestle bridge to an open cliffside path with expansive valley views.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail through pine forest

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along the narrow trail, following another rider through the rocky terrain

notable_agents.action: leading the way on horseback along the winding trail

entered.detail: tall gray rock face running alongside the left side of the trail
evergreen trees scattered on the hillside to the right
narrow winding dirt path through the rocky landscape
rocks and stones lining the edges of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with two riders on horseback traversing a narrow dirt trail carved through rocky mountain terrain. A tall cliff wall runs along the left side while pine trees dot the right hillside, creating an enclosed forested passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail passing wooden trestle bridge

events.description: large wooden trestle bridge becomes visible on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as it curves slightly, approaching and passing the wooden bridge structure

notable_agents.action: riding ahead, maintaining pace along the winding trail

entered.detail: large wooden bridge structure with support beams spanning a gap in the terrain

segments.scene_description: As the riders progress, a prominent wooden trestle bridge comes into view on the right, marking a transition point in the landscape. The trail remains narrow with the cliff wall on the left, while the bridge structure dominates the right side of the frame before receding into the distance.

events.description: trail opens up to reveal expansive valley and river canyon view on the right
path curves left as it follows the cliff edge along the valley rim

agents.ego_description: riding along the cliff edge with the valley visible below, following the lead rider as the path curves

notable_agents.action: riding ahead along the cliffside path, navigating the curve

entered.detail: expansive view of the valley opening up below the cliff edge
river visible at the bottom of the canyon far below
mountain range visible on the horizon under the cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: The trail opens dramatically to reveal a breathtaking valley overlook with a river visible far below. The riders continue along the cliff edge as the path curves left, with distant mountains appearing on the horizon. The wooden bridge is left behind as the landscape transitions to more open terrain with sparse vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow mountain trail that transforms from an enclosed forested passage into an expansive cliffside overlook. It begins with two riders traversing a dirt path carved between a towering cliff wall and a pine-dotted hillside. As the riders progress, the landscape shifts to feature a prominent wooden trestle bridge that dominates the right side of the frame before receding into the distance. The scene then opens dramatically as the trail curves left, leaving the bridge behind to reveal a breathtaking valley with a river far below. Finally, the terrain transitions to open vistas with sparse vegetation and distant mountains appearing on the horizon.
